MINI MINUTES: Peter Clerides appearing for petitioner. Counsel has filed declarations to respond to the examiner's notes. He did not get back some of the 13050 declarations. Counsel is not requesting for fees. Matter is continued to 8/15. Court will not order joint tenancy. Court will have no problem with them changing it later.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: De Leon.
